ceo_directive_2026_04_25: Auto-approve architectural decisions (Path A: SysNav as standard, Apache 2.0 boundary preserved)
Emphasize broad test coverage in SDD

scope_summary.new_dependencies: none — all new code uses numpy, opencv, mujoco already in [perception] extras
deferred_to_v25: Real Go2 + Livox + Ricoh Theta integration

history.details: v2.4 perception overhaul (YOLOE+SAM3) artifacts moved to .sdd/archive-v2.4-perception-overhaul/. Reason: SysNav already provides equivalent capabilities (SAM2+YOLO+cloud_image_fusion); reimplementing duplicates effort.
Deleted vlm_qwen.py / go2_perception.py / go2_calibration.py and their tests + verify script + v2.3 live-REPL checklist. sim_tool.py Qwen wire-up replaced with comment pointing at sysnav_bridge.

v2.4 redirected to SysNav simulation integration. Spec drafted with 9 MUST goals (3 sensors + xmat fix + bridge subscriber + CLI tool + cleanup + docs), 5 SHOULD (latency / coverage targets), 3 MAY (deferrable). 50+ unit + 5 integration tests targeted, 90% coverage gate.

Plan: 15 technical decisions (sensor location, lidar polar grid, pano cube-face stitch, ground-truth odom skipping SLAM, lazy rclpy import, MultiThreadedExecutor matching v2.3 pattern, 0 new deps, GSO deferred to v2.5). 8 task / 6 wave execution sketch.

Task breakdown: T0 env probe, T1 lidar360, T2 gt_odom, T3 xmat fix, T4 pano360, T5 LiveSysnavBridge, T6 vnav_bridge wiring, T7 sysnav_sim_tool, T8 smoke+docs. Each task lists explicit RED test names; coverage gate 90%. Serial subagent dispatch per wave (per feedback_no_parallel_agents.md).
